message: [swap rejected: target set_05_kade_dresses_01 is not a listing]
Howdy partners. Got a mighty fine And Blue Blouse here (set_05_duke_tops_01). I'm lookin' to trade it for some quality bottoms or a nice dress. Saddle up and show me what you got.
Hi everyone! Trading my And White Sweater (outerwear). Looking for bottoms or dresses in good condition. Open to offers!

Hi everyone! Hope you're having a wonderful day. I'm offering a great pair of And Tan Pants (set_05_jade_bottoms_01). I'd absolutely love to swap for some nice dresses or tops. Let me know if you'd like to trade!
Waiting to see more listings. Particularly interested in dresses!
Perfect! I'd love to trade my And White Sweater for your Brown Floral Dress. Deal!
Hi Jade! Hope you're having an awesome day too! Your tan pants look wonderful. Would you be interested in trading them for my bright and cheerful Yellow Top (set_05_mira_tops_01)? Let's chat!
All done with my trading. Good luck to everyone else!

Hi everyone! I'm super excited to trade my Sweater And Jeans (set_05_nola_bottoms_01). It's in great shape! I'm looking for some lovely outerwear or dresses. Let's make a great deal that works for both of us!
My trading is complete - no more items available.
Listing my White Dress (set_05_rex_dresses_01). Seeking outerwear in exchange. Firm on requirements.
